cover_brand.hero_left_visual.summary: Brand-led cover with editable title and a controlled no-text visual background.

statement_plus_evidence.left_rule_panel.summary: One clear judgment with supporting evidence, using a strong rule and light visual texture.

evidence_board.source_table.summary: Source-grounded evidence page with editable rows, captions, and takeaway hierarchy.

comparison_matrix.two_column_delta.summary: Editable comparison page with two sides, delta markers, and explicit conclusion.

process_flow.horizontal_steps.summary: Horizontal service flow with editable steps and generated no-text process accents.

metric_panel.large_number_strip.summary: Editable benefit or KPI panel with large numbers, units, and supporting conditions.

risk_callout.qa_stack.summary: Risk, caveat, or FAQ page with clear conditions and action-safe wording.

action_roadmap.owner_timeline.summary: Editable action roadmap with timeline, owner, status, and next move.

closing_commitment.brand_tail.summary: Brand-tail closing page with editable closing statement and controlled background.
